sub_mechanisms: M_1: pre-defined rank-r tangent subbundle of parameter space
M_2: verify Lie bracket closure (involutivity) during update
M_3: integrate updates along leaves of the integrable distribution
M_4: prevent updates that violate involutivity
stripped_llm_application: LoRA updates restricted to a pre-defined rank-r tangent subbundle of parameter space; the subbundle's involutivity (Lie-bracket closure) is verified each step; updates integrate along leaves of the integrable foliation; the constraint prevents 'transverse' parameter motion that would break the foliated structure.
novelty_claim_stripped: GeoLoRA uses geometric integration on quotient manifold; LoL uses GL-equivariant processing. Neither enforces involutivity constraint.
